brand-story-img-4a7b1c.query:
Our Story Quietly made. Worn for years. We started Velmora with a single belief: fine jewelry shouldn't
              live behind a velvet rope. Every piece is hand-finished in small
              batches — 18K gold plating, hypoallergenic cores, and the kind of
              weight that says "I'll be in your
              jewelry box for a long time." goldsmith bench jewelry workshop warm light
